positive: A vibrant, highly detailed symmetrical celestial portal illustration, featuring intricate mandalas of bioluminescent flora and cosmic geometry. The central subject is an ethereal gateway framed by stylized constellations and swirling galactic nebula patterns. Style: Hyper-detailed neo-tribal etching mixed with bioluminescent vaporwave aesthetics. Composition: Centralized, circular/symmetrical design with strong vertical balance, suitable for a chest print. Color Palette: Deep cosmic blues, vibrant electric teals, magenta, and luminous gold highlights against a deep void black background. Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast glow emanating from the central portal, casting sharp, clean edges. Print-friendly details: Solid color blocking and crisp line work, no gradient falloff on critical edges, vector illustration quality.
negative: photorealistic, low detail, blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetry, grain, out of focus, bad composition, messy background
